THIS IS A BRAND NEW CAR I PURCHASED.  THERE IS A HIGH-PITCHED NOISE THAT THE BRAKE PEDAL MAKES WHEN YOU DEPRESS THE BRAKE PEDAL.  I THOUGHT THIS WAS PART OF THE BEEPS THE CAR MAKES, BUT IT'S NOT.  THE BRAKE BOOSTER WAS REPLACED, BUT THE BRAKE PEDAL CONTINUES TO MAKE A HIGH-PITCHE

TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2018 TOYOTA PRIUS. THE CONTACT STATED THAT WHILE DRIVING ABOUT 65 MPH, ANOTHER VEHICLE PULLED INTO THE HIGHWAY, WITHOUT STOPPING, AND CRASHED INTO THE FRONT DRIVER'S SIDE FENDER OF THE CONTACT'S VEHICLE. THE CONTACT STATED THAT NONE OF THE AIR BAGS DEPLOYED

narrative.headline: Lights and wipers top the gripe list, but brakes and acceleration are the ones to watch
narrative.summary: Across 34 owner complaints filed with NHTSA, exterior lighting and visibility/wiper issues are reported most often (5 reports each, 15% apiece). The more serious cluster is on the safety side: service brakes and vehicle speed control each drew 4 reports tied to 2 crashes, and air bags drew 3 reports linked to 1 crash and 1 injury. None of these complaints involved a fire or a death.

issues.title: Exterior Lighting
issues.blurb: The single most common complaint, tied for the top spot with 5 reports (15%). No crashes, injuries, or fires reported here.

issues.title: Visibility/Wiper
issues.blurb: Also 5 reports (15%), tied for most-reported. No crashes, injuries, or fires reported here.

issues.sample: THIS IS A BRAND NEW CAR I PURCHASED.  THERE IS A HIGH-PITCHED NOISE THAT THE BRAKE PEDAL MAKES WHEN YOU DEPRESS THE BRAKE PEDAL.  I THOUGHT THIS WAS PART OF THE BEEPS THE CAR MAKES, BUT IT'S NOT.  THE BRAKE BOOSTER WAS REPLACED, BUT THE BRAKE PEDAL CONTINUES TO MAKE A HIGH-PITCHE
issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: 4 reports (12%), and 2 of them involved a crash. Worth taking seriously on a test drive and inspection.

issues.title: Vehicle Speed Control
issues.blurb: 4 reports (12%), 2 of which involved a crash, including accounts of the car accelerating on its own. One of the most safety-relevant areas here.

issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2018 TOYOTA PRIUS. THE CONTACT STATED THAT WHILE DRIVING ABOUT 65 MPH, ANOTHER VEHICLE PULLED INTO THE HIGHWAY, WITHOUT STOPPING, AND CRASHED INTO THE FRONT DRIVER'S SIDE FENDER OF THE CONTACT'S VEHICLE. THE CONTACT STATED THAT NONE OF THE AIR BAGS DEPLOYED
issues.title: Air Bags
issues.blurb: 3 reports (9%), tied to 1 crash and 1 injury, including a report of air bags not deploying in a collision. The only area here with an injury on record.
